zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Say於大約1235年出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，她的父親William De Saye III29歲，母親Mrs. William de Saye III26歲。她於1273年5月12日與Robert de Ufford I在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年8月10日在英國素福爾可享年74歲。

zh-hans.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh-hans.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh-hans.Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰素福爾可瑟斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Say于大约1235年出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，她的父亲William De Saye III29岁，母亲Mrs. William de Saye III26岁。她于1273年5月12日与Robert de Ufford I在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年8月10日在英国素福爾可享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Say
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

variants.name: Sey
meanings: English and Scottish: probably a variant of   Say   particularly prevalent in Scotland.
Dutch and Flemish: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Sigiheri (see Seger ).
West African (Ghana): Akan (Fante) name of unexplained etymology.

variants.name: Sayer
meanings: English: common occupational name from Middle English sayer, a phonetic variant of Sawyer , which in Wales and neighboring English counties may have been reinforced by the synonymous Welsh saer ‘carpenter’ and everywhere by a possible borrowing into Middle English of Old French seieor, saieur ‘sawyer’.

English: rare occupational name perhaps denoting an assayer of metals, or a servant who tasted his lord's food before serving, from Middle English saiour ‘assayer, tester’ (a shortened form of Old French assaiour, ultimately from Late Latin exagium, a derivative of exagmināre ‘to weigh’).
English: rare occupational name for a professional reciter or minstrel, from Middle English seier(e) ‘speaker’.

variants.name: Saye
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Say was born about 1235, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, her father, William De Saye III, was 29 and her mother, Mrs. William de Saye III, was 26. She married Robert de Ufford I on 12 May 1273, in Thurston, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 August 1308, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Say est née environ 1235, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Saye III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Saye III, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ufford I le 12 mai 1273, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 août 1308, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Say um 1235 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Saye III 29 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William de Saye III 26. Sie hat am 12. Mai 1273 in Thurston, Suffolk, England Robert de Ufford I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. August 1308 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Say è nata il circa 1235 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, William De Saye III, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mrs. William de Saye III, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ufford I il 12 maggio 1273, nel Thurston, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1308, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Sayが約1235年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父William De Saye IIIは29歳，母Mrs. William de Saye IIIは26歳であった。1273年5月12日にイギリススフォルクスウルストンでRobert de Ufford Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年8月10日にイギリススフォルクで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Say(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Saye III(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William de Saye III(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1273년 5월 12일 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에서 Robert de Ufford I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 8월 10일 영국 수폴크에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: Thurston, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Say nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Saye III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Saye III, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ufford I em 12 de maio de 1273, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1308, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Say родилась около 1235 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William De Saye III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Saye III, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ufford I 12 мая 1273 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 августа 1308 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Say nació aproximadamente 1235, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Saye III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mrs. William de Saye III, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert de Ufford I el 12 de mayo de 1273, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1308, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
